channel.title: LLM Timeline — Xiaohongshu/RedNote Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Xiaohongshu/RedNote.

item.title: dots.llm1 (Xiaohongshu/RedNote)
item.description: Parameters: dots.llm1 License: open Type: model 142B-A14B. "dots.llm1, a large-scale MoE model that activates 14 billion parameters out of a total of 142 billion parameters, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art models while reducing training and inference costs. Leveraging our meticulously crafted and efficient data processing pipeline, dots.llm1 achieves performance comparable to Qwen2.5-72B after pretraining on 11.2T high-quality tokens and post-training to fully unlock its capabilities. Notably, no synthetic data is used during pretraining. To foster further research, we open-source intermediate training checkpoints at every one trillion tokens, providing valuable insights into the learning dynamics of large language models."
